_comment: Runtime settings for the plugin. PTT is bound via X-Plane command binding. Volume range is 0.0-1.0. active_com selects which COM radio (1 or 2) the plugin monitors. backend_mode picks the inference pipeline: 'local' runs whisper.cpp + llama.cpp + Piper (Apple Silicon only, models under <plugin>/Resources/models/); 'openai' runs the full cloud pipeline (Whisper API + Chat Completions + TTS API, requires an API key in the macOS Keychain); 'mistral' runs Mistral's cloud pipeline (Voxtral STT + Mistral chat completions + Voxtral TTS, separate Keychain entry).
pilot_callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo
